description_long: This object is a chainsaw with a distinctive elongated body and a serrated cutting edge, likely made of metal, running along one side. The main body is a muted gray, with two rectangular brown sections at either end, which appear to be the handles. The serrated edge features evenly spaced, angular teeth, suggesting it is designed for efficient cutting. The handles are positioned parallel to each other, providing a secure grip for two-handed operation. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding or power source indicators, and the object appears to lack a traditional chainsaw engine housing or safety guard.
description: A minimalist chainsaw with a gray serrated blade and two brown rectangular handles at each end, designed for two-handed use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full serrated blade profile and both brown handles clearly.
description_view_1: Edge-on view, making the object appear as a thin vertical line with the handles visible as small rectangles at the top and bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the serrated blade and both handles, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, showing the thin profile and both handles.
attribute_handle_design: Two straight rectangular handles, one at each end, parallel to each other, with no visible ergonomic or safety features.
